---
title: "People"
subtitle: "Team and collaborators"
page-layout: full
date-format: "YYYY-MM"
listing: 
- id: team
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 200px
  contents: 
    - /people/pi.yml

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

## Team

:::{#team}
:::

## Collaborators

I work with collaborators from various institutions. Get in touch if you're interested in collaboration.
